answer: November metadata canary `okf-canary-2026-11-md-frontmatter` showed a metadata extraction success rate issue caused by the md_frontmatter_ingest_v1 pipeline using body_text_only on non-index Markdown instead of yaml_frontmatter; the fix was to enable YAML frontmatter parsing on non-index Markdown files.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
